title: HEALTHCARE SERVICES - 211info
text: CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTH OFFICES HEALTHCARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, radiology, optometry, mental health, and lab services. Also offers medical care related to domestic violence and sexual assault. 200 Gwee-Shut Road Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and the general public. Dental care for tribal members only. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 444-1030 Toll-free (800) 648-0449 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Benton, Lane, Lincoln, Polk, Tillamook, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 9am-5pm Services: Cavity Prevention Measures * Native American Community Dental Hygiene * Native American Community Dental Prosthodontics * Native American Community Dental Restoration * Native American Community Emergency Dental Care * Native American Community Endodontics * Native American Community General Dentistry * Native American Community Geriatric Dentistry * Native American Community Indian Health Service Clinics Pediatric Dentistry * Native American Community Public Clinics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
